name: Auto Pawn Plus
description_short: Florida-licensed pawn broker specializing in high-end vehicle title loans and collateral pawns on cars, boats, and motorcycles with same-day funding up to $500,000.
description_long:
Auto Pawn Plus is a family-run pawn operation based in Miami, Florida, operating since 2010 with a sister company (Auto & Truck Buyers) established in 1993. The company is Florida-licensed and bonded, positioning itself as a specialized collateral lender focused exclusively on high-value assets rather than traditional retail pawn items. Their business model centers on short-term loans secured by vehicle titles—primarily luxury, exotic, classic, and muscle cars, but also motorcycles, boats, and trucks.

Auto Pawn Plus offers car title pawn loans, motorcycle title pawns, boat title pawns, and outright purchases of vehicles and collections. They advertise approval based solely on a car title and valid ID, with cash disbursement within 30 minutes to one hour of agreement. The company claims lending capacity up to $500,000 against eligible vehicles and states they will pick up vehicles anywhere in the U.S.A. They also buy complete collections, "barn yard finds," and restorations, positioning themselves as both lenders and vehicle buyers.

What distinguishes Auto Pawn Plus is their narrow but deep specialization in high-end collateral versus general pawn shops. They specifically target exotic marques (Porsche, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Rolls Royce, Bentley, Aston Martin, etc.), classic muscle cars, and specialty vehicles rather than jewelry, electronics, or typical pawn inventory. They advertise nationwide pickup and large collateral lending with "no deal too big or small," marketing themselves as buyers of rare collections and exotic vehicles globally.

Honestly assessed, Auto Pawn Plus is a legitimate pawn shop operating in a legal, licensed framework—but one that emphasizes speed and accessibility of capital against personal assets (vehicle titles) as its primary appeal. No APR, term length, or renewal fee information is disclosed on the website. The company's emphasis on "discreet" dealings and rapid payment may signal suitability for time-pressured sellers, but consumers should verify all loan terms, interest rates, and redemption conditions before pledging a vehicle title. The "no limit" messaging around lending amounts is marketing language; actual approval depends on vehicle appraisal and lender assessment.
pros: Florida-licensed and bonded pawn broker—verified legal status in regulated industry
Same-day or next-day funding (within 30 minutes to 1 hour claimed)—faster than traditional loans
Advertises lending up to $500,000 against qualifying vehicles—accessible to high-net-worth customers
Specializes in high-end, exotic, and classic vehicles—niche expertise vs. general pawn shops
Nationwide vehicle pickup service—eliminates transportation burden for out-of-state customers
No credit check requirement—approval based only on vehicle title and valid ID
Buys vehicle collections and barn finds—appeals to collectors and estate liquidation needs
Operates since 2010 with sister company since 1993—established track record in vehicle buying/lending
cons: No APR, term length, or interest rate disclosed on website—impossible to assess cost of borrowing before contact
No redemption terms, renewal fees, or loan duration policy published—consumer must call for critical terms
Emphasis on speed and 'discreet' dealings may obscure fine print or unfavorable loan conditions
Collateral-based lending means default results in loss of the pledged vehicle with no grace period typical in traditional loans
No independent reviews, ratings, or third-party verification visible on provided website content
best_for: High-net-worth individuals owning luxury, exotic, or classic vehicles who need immediate cash and can afford the loan terms
Vehicle collectors or estate executors liquidating multiple cars, boats, or motorcycles quickly
Borrowers with poor credit or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans and own titled collateral
diagnosis: Auto Pawn Plus is best for vehicle owners (especially those with exotic, classic, or high-value assets) who need immediate cash and have a titled vehicle as collateral. The primary caveat is that no interest rates, loan terms, or redemption policies are disclosed online—borrowers must contact the company directly and carefully review all paperwork before pledging a vehicle title, as default results in loss of the asset.
services: Car title pawn loans (short-term collateral loans secured by vehicle titles)
Purchase of individual vehicles and complete collections
meta_description: Florida pawn broker offering vehicle title loans and collateral pawns on cars, boats, and motorcycles with same-day funding.
